name: SOL Range Failure Reacceptance v1
thesis: In transition-heavy SOL 4h conditions, failed excursions from balance can mean-revert once price re-enters value. The edge should come from broad reacceptance after a false break, not exact one-bar reversal timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

long: Take profit: EMA_20 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_20 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
